requirement_topic.en: SIRIM Mandatory Product Certification — Electrical Safety for Heat Pumps and Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: SIRIM强制产品认证——热泵及空调电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: SIRIM強制產品認證——熱泵及空調電氣安全

summary.en: SIRIM QAS International administers Malaysia's mandatory product certification scheme for electrical appliances, including heat pump air conditioners, under MS 1062 and the harmonised IEC 60335-2-40 (particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers). A valid SIRIM certification mark is required before goods can clear Malaysian customs and be offered for sale. The importer or local authorised representative typically holds the certification obligation. Testing must be performed at a SIRIM-recognised laboratory. CCC certificates issued in China are not recognised as equivalent evidence.
summary.zh: SIRIM QAS International依据MS 1062及与IEC 60335-2-40（热泵、空调器及除湿机的专项要求）协调的马来西亚标准，管理包括热泵空调在内的电器强制产品认证。货物通过马来西亚海关并上市销售前须持有有效的SIRIM认证标志。通常由进口商或当地授权代理承担认证义务。测试须在SIRIM认可实验室进行。中国颁发的CCC证书不被视为等同证据。
summary.zht: SIRIM QAS International依據MS 1062及與IEC 60335-2-40（熱泵、空調器及除濕機的專項要求）協調的馬來西亞標準，管理包括熱泵空調在內的電器強制產品認證。貨物通過馬來西亞海關並上市銷售前須持有有效的SIRIM認證標誌。通常由進口商或當地授權代理承擔認證義務。測試須在SIRIM認可實驗室進行。中國頒發的CCC證書不被視為等同證據。

standards_or_laws: MS 1062 — Malaysian Standard for safety of household and similar electrical appliances
IEC 60335-2-40 — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers (harmonised into MS)
Malaysia Electricity Supply Act 1990 and Electricity Regulations 1994
SIRIM QAS International mandatory product certification scheme

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) regime covers household electrical appliances including heat pumps and air conditioners under GB 4706.32 / GB 4706.1 (safety) and GB 4343.1 (EMC). CCC certificates and Chinese national-standard test reports are domestic-market credentials and are not accepted as Malaysian SIRIM certification evidence.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（强制性产品认证）制度依据GB 4706.32 / GB 4706.1（安全）及GB 4343.1（电磁兼容）覆盖包括热泵和空调在内的家用电器。CCC证书及按中国国家标准出具的测试报告属于国内市场资质，不被接受为马来西亚SIRIM认证证据。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（強制性產品認證）制度依據GB 4706.32 / GB 4706.1（安全）及GB 4343.1（電磁相容）覆蓋包括熱泵和空調在內的家用電器。CCC證書及按中國國家標準出具的測試報告屬於國內市場資質，不被接受為馬來西亞SIRIM認證證據。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute SIRIM certification. Chinese exporters must engage a SIRIM-recognised conformity assessment body, submit product samples for testing to MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40, obtain the SIRIM certification mark, and ensure the local importer or authorised representative is named on the certificate before Malaysian customs clearance. Existing Chinese-standard test reports cannot be directly reused.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代SIRIM认证。中国出口商须委托SIRIM认可的符合性评定机构，提交产品样品按MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40进行测试，取得SIRIM认证标志，并确保当地进口商或授权代理在证书上署名后，方可通过马来西亚海关清关。现有中国标准测试报告不可直接复用。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代SIRIM認證。中國出口商須委託SIRIM認可的符合性評定機構，提交產品樣品按MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40進行測試，取得SIRIM認證標誌，並確保當地進口商或授權代理在證書上署名後，方可通過馬來西亞海關清關。現有中國標準測試報告不可直接復用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SIRIM certification required before customs clearance and sale in Malaysia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable domestic-market products under CCC; not recognised as equivalent to SIRIM

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — SIRIM mandatory certification is required before Malaysian customs clearance; CCC evidence is not accepted; independent testing to MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40 is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——通过马来西亚海关前须完成SIRIM强制认证；CCC证据不被接受；须独立按MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40完成测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——通過馬來西亞海關前須完成SIRIM強制認證；CCC證據不被接受；須獨立按MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40完成測試。
